meta.disclaimer: Openings, deadlines, preferences, and application steps may change quickly. Always confirm the latest status with the official housing authority before applying or advising others.
meta.sourcePolicy: Official housing authority or HUD links only.

records.applicationWindow: Open March 16, 2026 through April 15, 2026 at 11:59 p.m.
records.statusSummary: Open waitlist window listed on the authority's apply-for-housing page.
records.notes: The official page states that the wait lists are open for eligible low-income individuals, families, older adults, and persons with disabilities during the listed March 16 to April 15, 2026 window.

records.authority: Housing Authority of the City of Beverly
records.applicationWindow: Opens the third Wednesday of each month from 9:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m.
records.statusSummary: Recurring monthly application window published by the housing authority.
records.notes: The authority's waiting-list page says applications open on the third Wednesday of each month for a limited mid-morning window. For April 2026, that falls on Wednesday, April 15, 2026.

records.applicationWindow: Open April 13, 2026 at 8:00 a.m. through April 16, 2026 at 4:00 p.m.
records.statusSummary: Preference-only opening for applicants already on qualifying waitlists.
records.notes: The agency lists the main Housing Choice Voucher program as closed, but the Bring It Home program is open for a short period to applicants already on an HCV, PBV, or Rural Development waiting list and currently living in Scott County.

records.statusSummary: The authority indicates the HCV waitlist is closed.
records.notes: CHA's public qualification page states that the Housing Choice Voucher waitlist is closed and that future openings will be announced publicly when available.

records.authority: Housing Authority of the County of Riverside
records.statusSummary: Closure notice posted for the Project-Based Voucher waiting lists.
records.notes: The county housing authority published a closure notice stating that applications would be accepted until February 8, 2026 at 11:59 p.m., with the waiting lists closed effective February 9, 2026.

records.applicationWindow: No open HCV waitlist window identified at time of verification
records.statusSummary: Applicants should monitor the official PHA site for future announcements.
records.notes: Philadelphia reopened its HCV waitlist in January 2023 after a long closure. At the time of this April 14, 2026 verification pass, no current open HCV application window was identified on the official authority site, so this record is treated as closed pending a new announcement.
